message:
fix(cli): guard ballast size calculation against integer overflow (bd-1f1)

Use checked_mul() when converting CLI --ballast-size MB to bytes,
returning a clear CliError::User if the value overflows u64. Use
saturating_mul for the dry-run total-GB display in install.rs to
prevent silent wraparound in the summary calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
